---
id: get-ems-total-device
title: "查询单设备能耗总量"
description: "查询指定设备在时间范围内的能耗总量（kWh）。"
sidebar_label: "查询单设备能耗总量"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询单设备能耗总量"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/ems/total/device"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询指定设备在时间范围内的能耗总量（kWh）。

:::tip
仅可查询能够提供耗电量数据的设备。详情请参考 Aqara Studio 文档 [能耗管理](https://docs.aqara.com/zh/docs/aqara-studio/energy-management-system#%E5%89%8D%E6%8F%90%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6)。
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["startTime","endTime","deviceId"],"properties":{"startTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"起始时间（UTC 毫秒时间戳）。","example":1704067200000},"endTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"结束时间（UTC 毫秒时间戳）。","example":1704153600000},"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。","example":"device_001"}},"title":"EmsTotalDeviceRequest"},"examples":{"deviceTotal":{"value":{"startTime":1704067200000,"endTime":1704153600000,"deviceId":"device_001"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["totalValue"],"properties":{"totalValue":{"type":"number","format":"double","description":"时间范围内的能耗总量（kWh）。","example":45.6}},"title":"EmsTotalData"}}}],"example":{"type":"EmsDeviceTotalResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7f012","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"totalValue":45.6}},"title":"EmsDeviceTotalResponse"},"examples":{"deviceTotalSuccess":{"value":{"type":"EmsDeviceTotalResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7f012","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"totalValue":45.6}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
